summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in colocation and power layers, led by Maharashtra, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh, and Karnataka, with policy tailwinds from state data centre policies and power open access. The top India policy hook is the UP Data Centre Policy 2026 targeting Rs 2 lakh crore investment. Value-chain movers include hyperscalers expanding capacity and investors like Blackstone and Brookfield anchoring large-scale commitments. Foreign hyperscalers are actively scaling in India, with Amazon leading at $48 billion, followed by Microsoft, Google, and AWS.

top_plays.headline: Nxtra (Airtel) to quadruple data centre capacity to 1GW in Haryana leveraging new 2026 policy
top_plays.why_now: News on 2026-07-20 shows Nxtra's plan to quadruple capacity to 1GW driven by AI demand (ids: 5b2f05e19ae6, d11ab5b7ec79, 9d0ce157f41f). Haryana state[...] line confirms clause-verified 2026 policy with essential-service status, high FAR, dual-grid intent (from profile). Cross-stream: news (expansion plan) + state policy (Haryana 2026 policy) signals within freshness window.
top_plays.state_hook: Haryana: NCR/Gurugram-Manesar demand with clause-verified 2026 policy, essential-service status, high FAR, dual-grid intent, and public-procurement angle.

top_plays.headline: NTT DATA to expand AI-ready data center infrastructure in Maharashtra with $1.5B commitment
top_plays.why_now: News on 2026-07-20 confirms NTT DATA's $1.5B commitment over three years for AI-ready data center expansion in India (ids: 7fef71eb3a82, c3eac323406b). Maharashtra state[...] line cites mature Mumbai/Navi Mumbai ecosystem plus strong legal/economic policy detail (from profile). Cross-stream: news (capex commitment) + state policy (Maharashtra ecosystem/policy) signals within freshness window.
top_plays.state_hook: Maharashtra: Mature Mumbai/Navi Mumbai ecosystem plus strong legal/economic policy detail.

top_plays.headline: Blackstone-backed AirTrunk to invest $30B in India for 5GW data centre capacity by 2030
top_plays.why_now: News on 2026-06-05 reports Blackstone-backed AirTrunk's $30B India investment for 5GW data centre capacity by 2030 (ids: bf65118bf810, c976f941d792, c45eea080806). Policy signal on 2026-07-07 shows Qatar Central Bank Governor meeting international financial institutions (id: c0cbd9f693ce) indicating enabling environment. Cross-stream: news (investment plan) + policy (Qatar Central Bank meeting) signals within freshness window. No state[...] lines in packet — site-selection is the opening.
top_plays.state_hook: no state match yet — site-selection is the opening
